SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Interface ISequentialAPI

public interface ISequentialAPI
This interface defines a sequential I/O API for performing basic file or resource operations such as opening, reading, writing, flushing, and closing resources. It supports various open modes and lock modes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes the resource.
    void
    flush()
    Flushes any buffered data to the underlying resource.
    long
    getLastOffset()
    Gets the last offset read.
    void
    open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
    Opens a resource with the specified open mode and lock mode.
    void
    open(Reader reader)
    Opens a resource using a reader.
    boolean
    readNext()
    Reads the next record from the resource.
    void
    write()
    Writes data to the resource.
    void
    writeAfter(Advancing advancing)
    Writes data to the resource after advancing N PAGES/LINES.

  • Method Details

    • open

      void open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode) throws IOException
      Opens a resource with the specified open mode and lock mode.
      Parameters:
      openMode - The open mode (e.g., READ, WRITE).
      lockMode - The lock mode (e.g., SHARED, EXCLUSIVE).
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during opening.

    • open

      void open(Reader reader) throws IOException
      Opens a resource using a reader.
      Parameters:
      reader - The reader to use for opening.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during opening.

    • flush

      void flush() throws IOException
      Flushes any buffered data to the underlying resource.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during flushing.

    • readNext

      boolean readNext() throws IOException
      Reads the next record from the resource.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if no more items are available.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during reading.

    • write

      void write() throws IOException
      Writes data to the resource.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during writing.

    • writeAfter

      void writeAfter(Advancing advancing) throws IOException
      Writes data to the resource after advancing N PAGES/LINES.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during writing.

    • close

      void close() throws IOException
      Closes the resource.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs during closing.

    • getLastOffset

      long getLastOffset()
      Gets the last offset read.
      Returns:
      The last offset.
